source.title: NPNF2-06. Jerome: The Principal Works of St. Jerome
NPNF2-06. Jerome: The Principal Works of St. Jerome

verses.text: In this letter Jerome, at the request of Damasus, gives a minutely detailed explanation of the parable of the prodigal son.
